overview.value: Lucky Bamboo is a Dracaena often grown in water or a light potting mix. It is compact, decorative, and tolerant of indoor light.

localizedContentsJSON.value: {"en":{"commonName":"Lucky Bamboo","overview":"Lucky Bamboo is a Dracaena often grown in water or a light potting mix. It is compact, decorative, and tolerant of indoor light.","tips":"Use filtered water if leaf tips brown or stems yellow."},"zh-Hans":{"commonName":"富贵竹","overview":"富贵竹是常以水培或轻质介质栽培的龙血树属植物。它株型小巧、有装饰性，也能适应室内光线。","tips":"如果叶尖发黄或茎秆变黄，可以尝试使用过滤水。"}}
